header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: There was a problem handling your password reset request - %reason%
trans-unit.source: There was a problem handling your password reset request - %reason%
trans-unit.target: There was a problem handling your password reset request - %reason%

trans-unit.resname: There was a problem validating your reset request - %reason%
trans-unit.source: There was a problem validating your reset request - %reason%
trans-unit.target: There was a problem validating your reset request - %reason%
